payload.answer: There is a possible temporal status conflict. The existing memory says the Brain Slack agent is planned and open, while the new information says the Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented. If the MVP implementation updates the same project status, use approve_supersession. If the broader project remains open while only the MVP milestone is implemented, use keep_both. If the new statement is incorrect, use reject_new. If the wording needs clarification before saving, use edit.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
